record.field: Dear {customer_name}, your loan {loan_number} has an overdue instalment of KES {amount}. It is now {days_overdue} day(s) past due. Please pay immediately to avoid additional penalties. Outstanding balance: KES {outstanding_balance}. - {company_name}

Dear {customer_name}, your loan {loan_number} matures on {maturity_date}. You have {days_overdue} day(s) remaining. Outstanding balance: KES {outstanding_balance}. Please arrange your final payment. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, we have received your payment of KES {amount} for loan {loan_number}. Remaining balance: KES {outstanding_balance}. Thank you for your payment. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your loan {loan_number} of KES {amount} has been disbursed. Repayment begins on {due_date}. For queries call us. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, congratulations! Your loan application {loan_number} has been approved for KES {amount}. We will contact you for disbursement. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your loan application {application_number} for KES {amount} has been submitted successfully. We will review and notify you of the outcome. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, we regret to inform you that your loan application {loan_number} was not approved at this time. Please visit our offices for more information. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your loan {loan_number} of KES {amount} has been disbursed. Repayment begins on {due_date}. For queries call us. - {company_name}

Dear {customer_name}, your loan {loan_number} payment of KES {amount} is {days_overdue} days overdue. Please pay immediately to avoid further action. Balance: KES {outstanding_balance}. - {company_name}
Dear {investor_name}, KES {interest_amount} interest has been credited to your investment account {investment_number}. Thank you for investing with us. - {company_name}
Dear {investor_name}, your investment statement for {period} has been generated and sent to your email. Closing balance: {currency} {amount}. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your installment of KES {amount} for loan {loan_number} is due on {due_date}. Please ensure your account is funded. Thank you. - {company_name}
Dear {guarantor_name}, you have been named as a guarantor for {customer_name}'s loan application. Reply with code {code} to confirm or CALL to decline. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your loan top-up of KES {amount} has been disbursed. Your new principal balance is KES {new_principal}. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, we have applied your partial payoff of KES {amount}. You have saved KES {savings} in future interest. New balance: KES {outstanding_balance}. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your payment holiday for {months} months has been activated. Repayments will resume after {end_date}. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your loan refinance is complete. Old loan has been settled and new loan {new_loan} is now active. - {company_name}
Dear {customer_name}, your {loan_count} loans have been consolidated into a single account {new_loan}. Check your email for the new schedule. - {company_name}
